creator: rwn@mailo.com
text:
Hello, 

In fact I proposed myself to be the maintainer (see maintainer item in the patch) and my question on 2025-04-10 was about becoming maintainer in some sense... However, I have no experience in maintaining a port. But, I use my up-to-date version of mu on my network, build with poudriere, since almost 1 year and works fine with the patches I proposed. If you think you have more experience go ahead. 

Note, the maintainer is not responding since this first bug #280678 I reported on mu. 

Best, E.
